item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Our website address is: https://le-network.nl.

What personal data we collect and why we collect it

Comments

When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Contact forms

Cookies

If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Analytics

Who we share your data with

How long we retain your data

If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where we send your data

Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

Your contact information

Additional information

How we protect your data

What data breach procedures we have in place

What third parties we receive data from

What automated decision making and/or profiling we do with user data

Industry regulatory disclosure requirements

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M7h3tOLdEjU

Passie voor ondernemenderwijs

LE-Network is zoals het woord het al zegt: een groot en enthousiast netwerk van personen en organisaties die -dikwijls samen- leerprocessen willen verbeteren. Daarbij brengt een ieder een specifieke visie, competentie, context of ervaring mee. Dat kan bijvoorbeeld gebeuren binnen afzonderlijke projecten. Als vrijwilliger of als leverancier van kennis, tijd dan wel -in zeer beperkte mate- middelen. Inmiddels bestaat LE-Network, ooit begonnen vanuit de Hogeschool Drenthe als een "ondernemenderwijs"-initiatief van enkele studenten, meer dan 25 jaar. De idiële doelstelling: het bevorderen van het leren van ondernemerschap en ondernemend leren is in alle jaren steeds de basis geweest. En is dat nog steeds. Het is een passie van alle betrokkenen bij LE-Network met de kenmerken van de Action Regulation Theory: proactive, selfstarting & overcoming barriers. Door de leerprocessen voortdurend te verbeteren, worden ze effectiever, efficiënter, flexibeler en creatiever.

Spelenderwijs leren: de LEARNGames

De methodiek van spelenderwijs leren heeft geleid tot diverse producten die al die jaren zijn ontwikkeld. En ook steeds verder ontwikkeld worden. Zo hebben we all geruime tijd de analoge LEARNGames (logistiek & operations management, ondernemerschap, diverse talen) terwijl we van dezelfde spellen ook digitale varianten hebben waarbij smartphones gebruikt worden. Bijvoorbeeld om banktransacties te registreren van elke smartphone in LEARNGames Entrepreneurship digital (in NL, D en Engels)  zodat de resulaten van de deelnemers onmiddellijk zichtbaar worden aan het eind van de spelsimulatie en bovendien individueel als PDF beschikbaar zijn op een ieders mailadres.Of bijvoobeeld onze digitale MEMORY Games met geluid die op elke smartphone gespeeld kunnen worden. Zowel individueel (zonder inlog) op www.freelearngames.nl als collectief in competitie (met inlog) De analoge LEARN Games zijn rollen-spel simulaties met LEGO om ondernemerschap, logistiek & operations management of talen te leren. LEGO zorgt voor positieve emoties (hebben we getoetst) en een speelse context. Daarbij beperken we ons tot de 6x6 grondplaat (LEGO 3958), 2x4 bouwsteen (LEGO 3001) en 2x2 bouwsteen (LEGO 3003) in veelal primaire kleuren. Verder gebruiken we (fake) €, $ of soms Roebels (bij LA-Game Russisch) en zelfs échte Burundi Franc ( BIF) in het ondernemerschapsspel.

Uitdagend leermateriaal

Innovatie doe je samen

Bij LE-Network zijn de volgende projecten nu in ontwikkeling waaraan u ook kan bijdragen;
  • Nieuwe Memory Games, zoals Arabisch, Dyslexie, Uitjes in Drenthe, Drents
  • De digitale LO-Game ("Legostiek digitaal")
  • Visualisering Entrecomp (EU ondernemerschapscompetenties) via "crazy quilt" (Sarasvathy)
  • LE-Boek:  https://doi.org/10.5281/ZENODO.17675821
  • Soft Skills Testen met snellere resultaten door middel van een nieuwe database met nieuwe functionaliteiten.
Leer meer over Edupreneurial Analoge LEARN Games Digitale LEARN Games Doe de Gedragsstijlscans

Contact

[contact-form-7 id="02b270a" title="Contactformulier 1"]

Bel ons

Henk 📞+31 06 50 51 40 62 Willem 📞+31 06 24 74 31 06

Mail ons

Henk Roelofs Willem Schreuder

Kom langs

LE-Network Dordsestraat 33, 7811 LA Emmen Nederland KvK: 04065917

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
https://youtu.be/y9egw-GuXEQ

Passionate about entrepreneurship

The Edupreneurial method

LE-Network is, as the word suggests, a large and enthusiastic network of partnerships. Our goal is to improve learning processes. By constantly improving the learning processes, they can become more effective, efficient, flexible and creative. For this we work with great passion on our products and services.

We improve the learning processes by applying the Edupreneurial method. "Action learning: Learning by doing!" So that you learn from your own experiences by learning while playing.

Learn more about Edupreneurial

Learning while playing

The LEARN Games

We have developed a number of products using the methodology. These products are divided into the analog LEARN Games (Simulation Games) and digital LEARN GAMES plus the MEMORY Games.

The analog LEARN Games are role-playing simulations with Lego that can be used to learn entrepreneurship, logistics or languages, among other things. The digital LEARN Games that have been developed are played using smartphones.

Check out the LEARN Games Digital LEARN Games

Challenging learning material

You innovate together

The following projects are being developed at LE-Network, to which you can also contribute

  • New Memory Games, such as Arabic, Dyslexia, Outings in Drenthe, Drents
  • The digital LO-Game ("Legostics digital")
  • Visualization Entrecomp (EU Entrepreneurial Competences) via "crazy quilt" (Sarasvathy)
  • LE Book
  • Soft Skills Testing with faster results due to a new database with new functionalities.
Try our behavioral scans Learn more about Edupreneurial Physical LEARN Games Digital LEARN Games Try our behavioral scans

Contact

Call us

Henk 📞+31 6 50 51 40 62
Willem 📞+31 6 24 74 31 06

Mail us

Henk Roelofs
Willem Schreuder

Visit us

LE-Network

Dordsestraat 33,
7811 LA
Emmen
The Netherlands

We have developed a number of products using the methodology. These products are divided into the analog LEARN Games (Simulation Games) and digital LEARN GAMES plus the MEMORY Games.

The analog LEARN Games are role-playing simulations with Lego that can be used to learn entrepreneurship, logistics or languages, among other things. The digital LEARN Games that have been developed are played using smartphones.

The following projects are being developed at LE-Network, to which you can also contribute

  • New Memory Games, such as Arabic, Dyslexia, Outings in Drenthe, Drents
  • The digital LO-Game ("Legostics digital")
  • Visualization Entrecomp (EU Entrepreneurial Competences) via "crazy quilt" (Sarasvathy)
  • LE Book
  • Soft Skills Testing with faster results due to a new database with new functionalities.

LE-Network - Working together to improve learning processes
LE-Network is a company that exists out of variations of collaborations where we put our minds together to create products to improve learning processes.

item.title: LE-Network
item.dc:creator: cdevries
item.content:encoded:
SAMENWERKEN OM LEERPROCESSEN TE VERBETEREN

Passie voor ondernemenderwijs

LE-Network is zoals het woord het al zegt: een groot en enthousiast netwerk van samenwerkingsverbanden. Ons doel is het om leerprocessen te verbeteren. Door de leerprocessen voortdurend te verbeteren kunnen deze effectiever, efficiënter, flexibeler en creatiever. Hiervoor werken wij met veel passie aan onze producten en diensten. 

Spelenderwijs leren

Het verbeteren van de leerprocessen doen we door het toepassen van de edupreneurial methode.

“Action learning: Leren door te doen!” Zodat je leert vanuit je eigen ervaringen door spelenderwijs te leren.

Met behulp van de methodiek hebben we een aantal aan producten ontwikkeld. Deze producten zijn onderverdeeld in de analooge LEARN Games (Simulatiespellen) en digitale LEARN GAMES plus de gedragsstijlscans (Soft skill tests).

Uitdagend leermateriaal

De LEARN Games zijn rollen-spel simulaties die ingezet kunnen worden om o.a. ondernemerschap, logistiek of talen te leren. De LEARN Games worden momenteel ook in een digitale versie ontwikkeld die gespeeld word met behulp van smartphones.

De gedragsstijlscans zijn soft Skill testen die je inzicht geven in je persoonlijke gedrag en handelen, of het gedrag van je team. Bijvoorbeeld met betrekking tot karakteristieke gedrags-eigenschappen. Of het omgaan met conflicten, of met leiderschap en/of wat voor leerstijl het beste bij je past.

item.title: Referenties
item.dc:creator: cdevries
item.content:encoded:
Referenties

“Onze studenten hadden er veel plezier in. Zowel hun ondernemerschap als creativiteit werden op de proef gesteld. Het was plezierig te vernemen dat ze innovatieve strategieën toepasten die minder gebruikelijk zijn.”

Loots

Docent Erasmus Univesiteit

“Het ondernemerschapsspel LE-Game geeft een ervaringsgerichte invulling aan meerdere aspecten van ondernemerschap en ondernemendheid. Wij zien veel plezier en gedrevenheid in deelname aan het spel. Leerlingen zetten zich volledig in en moeten daarvoor hun ondernemende vaardigheden inzetten. Het ondernemend gedrag kunnen we als docent observeren en met de leerlingen kunnen we napraten over hun ervaringen.”

Debbie Korenhoff

Bonaventura College

item.title: LE-Network products renamed to LEARN Games
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded: LE-Network has decided to redesign its product range. Because the simulation games LE and LA-Game are both difficult to distinguish in English, the simulation games together with the other teaching materials that LE-Network has developed can now be found under the name LEARN Games. From now on, LE-Game becomes the LEARN-Game Entrepreneurship and LA-Game the LEARN-Game Langauage. A separate website has been created for the assortment, which provides more information about the individual products. The products now also have their own logo.

item.title: Working with the "Niet-School" initiative!
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded: LE-Network is expanding its network with the cooperation with the "niet-School" initiative. An organization that, just like LE-Network, is committed to improving the learning processes here in the Netherlands. No to school, yes to learning! More information about the mission and vision of niet-school can be found on the Niet-School website .

item.title: New leadership for LE-Network
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
Friday afternoon, April 26, Henk Roelofs said goodbye to his daily duties at Stenden College. As a pensionada, he now has full time to devote himself to the improvements in education in which he has worked for a number of decades.

Henk Roelofs took over as director of Ronald Zuidema and starts a new management period for LE-Network. Hereby he can now be found daily from Monday to Friday at the office, Dordsestraat 33, of LE-Network where people are working hard on new developments for the playful learning motto.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: [contact-field label="Naam" type="name" required="1"][contact-field label="E-mailadres" type="email" required="1"][contact-field label="Bericht" type="textarea"]

item.title: Re-Xplore and LE-Network joining forces
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
From January 1, 2018, Re-Xplore and LE-Network have joined forces. LE-Network will continue to focus on the development and research of game simulations. Re-Xplore is responsible for the implementation of the LE-Game and LO-Game game simulations and is going to develop training courses so that teachers in education can operate independently as game leaders.

On December 27, 2017, author Henk Roelofs (L) signed the license agreement on behalf of LE-Network - as a licensor - with partner Bernoud Jonker on behalf of Re-Xplore as a licensee.

Re-Xplore is a new name, but not unknown to education. Our partner Bernoud Jonker has been providing game simulations (Serious Gaming) for a number of years in education both at home and abroad. Re-Xplore also has a national network of qualified game leaders with a passion for education.

Through the collaboration between LE-Network and Re-Xplore, different game simulations can be offered as enrichment of the curriculum (for example economics or entrepreneurship) or as an event such as during open days or at the start of the new school year.
item.excerpt:encoded: From January 1, 2018, Re-Xplore and LE-Network have joined forces. LE-Network will continue to focus on the development and research of game simulations. Re-Xplore is responsible for the implementation of the LE-Game and LO-Game game simulations and is going to develop training courses so that teachers in education can operate independently as game leaders.

item.title: Relocation of the LE-Network office
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded:
LE-Network moved to a new location on 1 March 2017. The new address is:
Dordsestraat 33 7811 LA Emmen The Netherlands
The new location is on the 2nd floor above the Heeroma Zorgwinkel. This can be achieved by taking the stairs up in the care store and then at the end of the hall to the left of the stairs. At the location there is possibility to park, the location is also easily accessible by public transport with a short walk from the Center.

item.title: Cum laude Oksana
item.dc:creator: hroelofs
item.content:encoded: Oksana Michajlovna Grynazhuk passed her Dutch language 2F with great scores. This could also be expected of someone who had already graduated as a 'specialist', an HBO + education at the Odessa State Ecological University. This week we planned to do the LEARNGame Russian for the Enrichment Class of the Hondsrug College. Two more native russian speaking colleagues of Oksana from this Dutch course at Drenthe College would also assist. Native Russian speakers are supporting the children in their Russian communication. COVID-19 has meant that we have had to postpone this to a later date in 2021.

item.title: referenties
item.dc:creator: cdevries
item.content:encoded:
Referenties

"Onze studenten hadden er veel plezier in. zowel hun ondernemerschap als hun creativiteit werden op de proef gesteld. Het was plezierig te vernemen dat ze innovatieve strategieën toepasten die minder gebruikelijk zijn."

Loots - Docent Erasmus Universiteit
